title: Living in Boulder vlog 5 - 11 - 2017: Collecting Ancient Classics for my website

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief vlog update about staying up until 5am collecting and organizing ancient classic books (Aristotle, Roman/Byzantine history) for his website. He describes his goal of aggregating as many old books as possible onto one page and plans to continue through the following Sunday.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: no single site has all the old books and none of them look good
excited and motivated, working extremely hard to compile as many historical texts as possible
